task_completion.description: The drawio file and exported PNG are saved on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Icons for 'marketplace_wardley_map.drawio' and 'marketplace_wardley_map.png' are visible on the Desktop, or the files are shown in a file manager/terminal.

task_completion.description: The map has the correct title and axis labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagram includes the title 'Online Marketplace Platform — Wardley Map'. The X-axis is labeled with 'Genesis', 'Custom Built' (or 'Custom'), 'Product (+rental)' (or 'Product'), and 'Commodity (+utility)' (or 'Commodity'). The Y-axis is labeled with 'Visible' at the top and 'Invisible' at the bottom.

task_completion.description: All 18 required components are present on the map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map contains nodes for exactly 18 components: Customer, Buyer Experience, Seller Experience, Search & Discovery, Product Listings, Checkout Flow, Seller Dashboard, Ratings & Reviews, Recommendation Engine, Fraud Detection, Order Management, Payment Processing, Notification Service, Data Analytics, Compute Infrastructure, Object Storage, CDN, Identity & Auth.

task_completion.description: Components are positioned in the correct evolution stages on the X-axis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Components are placed in their respective columns: 'Custom Built' (e.g., Seller Dashboard, Recommendation Engine, Fraud Detection), 'Product' (e.g., Buyer Experience, Search & Discovery, Order Management), and 'Commodity' (e.g., Customer, Payment Processing, Compute Infrastructure).

task_completion.description: Components are connected with lines to represent dependencies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are numerous lines (at least 12, ideally 19) connecting the component nodes, showing the value chain from visible components down to invisible infrastructure.

task_completion.description: A second page titled 'Strategic Moves' contains 3 strategic recommendations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second page tab named 'Strategic Moves' is visible in the diagramming tool, and its contents show a list of 3 strategic recommendations.

integrity.description: The agent used a diagramming tool (like draw.io) to create the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the draw.io interface (or similar graphical diagramming tool) being used to construct the map, rather than just a text editor editing XML.

integrity.description: The PNG file appears to be a genuine export of the created diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported PNG matches the diagram seen in the diagramming tool interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The map must contain exactly 18 components: Customer, Buyer Experience, Seller Experience, Search & Discovery, Product Listings, Checkout Flow, Seller Dashboard, Ratings & Reviews, Recommendation Engine, Fraud Detection, Order Management, Payment Processing, Notification Service, Data Analytics, Compute Infrastructure, Object Storage, CDN, Identity & Auth. The X-axis must have 4 stages: Genesis, Custom Built, Product (+rental), Commodity (+utility). The Y-axis must range from Visible to Invisible. Components must be placed in specific stages: Custom Built (Seller Dashboard, Recommendation Engine, Fraud Detection), Product (Buyer Experience, Seller Experience, Search & Discovery, Product Listings, Checkout Flow, Ratings & Reviews, Order Management, Notification Service, Data Analytics), Commodity (Customer, Payment Processing, Compute Infrastructure, Object Storage, CDN, Identity & Auth). There should be at least 12 (up to 19) dependency edges connecting these components. A second page named 'Strategic Moves' must list 3 recommendations.
